title: Sign in page
description: Build the login page at /login with email and password fields. On success, store the JWT and redirect to /dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Page renders a centered card with email and password fields and a Sign In button
Form shows inline validation errors for empty/invalid email and empty password
Submit button shows loading state while API call is in progress
Successful login stores JWT in localStorage and redirects to /dashboard
Invalid credentials shows error message 'Invalid email or password'
Page includes a link to /signup for new users

steps.details: Create src/web/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx. Use same centered card layout as SignupPage. App name/title at top of card.

steps.description: Build the form with React Hook Form and Zod
steps.details: Zod schema: z.object({ email: z.string().email('Invalid email'), password: z.string().min(1, 'Password is required') }). Use useForm with zodResolver. Render email and password Input components with error messages. Submit button shows loading during submission.

onSubmit: call login(email, password) from apiService. On success: call auth.login(response.access_token, response.user), navigate to /dashboard. On 401 error: show 'Invalid email or password' message. On other errors: show 'Something went wrong, please try again'.

steps.description: Add link to signup and verify with Playwright
steps.details: Add 'Don't have an account? Sign up' link pointing to /signup. Take Playwright screenshot. Verify redirect to /dashboard after successful login. Verify error message on wrong password.

technicalNotes: Reuse the same card layout pattern from SignupPage for visual consistency
